title: Debug CSS Specificity Bug
description: Fix a page where styles aren't applying due to specificity conflict.
hint: Use DevTools Computed tab to see which rule is winning.
solution: Identify the higher-specificity selector and either lower it or increase specificity of intended rule.
starterCode: This should be blue but is red

title: Fix Overflow Layout Issue
description: Fix an element that's overflowing its container horizontally.
hint: Check the box-sizing and add overflow-wrap for text.
solution: Add box-sizing: border-box and overflow-wrap: break-word to the overflowing element.
starterCode:
.container { width: 300px; }
.content { width: 100%; padding: 20px; /* content exceeds container */ }

title: Debug Flexbox Alignment
description: Debug why Flexbox items aren't aligning as expected.
hint: Enable Flexbox overlay in DevTools Layout panel. Check align-items, justify-content.
solution: Add align-items: center and justify-content: space-between to the flex container.
starterCode:
.flex-container { display: flex; width: 100%; }
.item { width: 100px; /* not centered */ }

title: Cross-Browser CSS Debug
description: Fix a layout that works in Chrome but breaks in Firefox/Safari.
hint: Check browser support tables, add vendor prefixes, use feature queries.
solution: Add @supports queries and vendor prefixes for the unsupported features.
starterCode: .container { display: grid; gap: 1rem; /* check gap support */ }

title: Full CSS Audit Report
description: Perform a complete CSS audit on a provided webpage and write a detailed report.
hint: Check: unused CSS, specificity issues, performance, accessibility, browser compatibility.
solution: Create report with sections: Coverage, Specificity, Performance, Responsive, Accessibility, Recommendations.
